title: Don't miss Carpe Musicam! spring concerts, starting on Friday
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Carpe Musicam! Orchestra...
bodyText:
GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Carpe Musicam! Orchestra and Choir will be performing their Spring 2024 Collection, Classics From The Movies, soon.

All the music in this programme is chosen from well-known classical music which has featured in movies.

Original, lush

Operatic favourites, such as Nessun Dorma and The Slaves Chorus from Nabucco in their original, lush, orchestral and choral clothes, will contrast with the rather naughty Mozart’s Samba alla Turca and Rimsky-Korsakov’s Scheherazade Goes Latin with virtuosic violin soloist Cherith Bain delighting audiences us with her soothing sounds.

Slow movement

Newcomer Carin Retief will solo in the slow movement of Mozart’s Clarinet Concerto, bringing back memories of Robert Redford and Meryl Streep in Out of Africa.

The programme is full of up-to-date versions of old favourites as well as a few more traditional treatments.

It promises to be fully family-friendly and, at about 90 minutes long, will not prove at all onerous on the concentration span.

Relax and enjoy

Come, relax and enjoy one of the three performances of Classics From The Movies at:

- George South Primary School at 19:00 on Friday, 27 September;

- Sedgefield NGK Hall at 15:30 on Sunday, 29 September; and

- Mossel Bay Town Hall at 15:30 on Sunday, 6 October.

Tickets are R150 per adult and R50 for learners. For tickets and more details, see www.carpemusicam.co.za.

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
